name: Snoopy's No Bake Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the peanut butter and margarine until well combined.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar, stirring after each addition to ensure there are no lumps.
3. Mix in the crushed graham cereal until evenly distributed.
4. Using your hands that have been lightly coated with butter, press the mixture firmly into an ungreased 9 x 9 dish.
5. In a saucepan over very low heat, melt the shortening. Once melted, remove from heat and stir in the chocolate chips until smooth.
6. Spread the melted chocolate evenly over the peanut butter mixture.
7. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to allow everything to set properly.
8. Let stand for an additional 10 minutes before cutting into bars.
9. Store leftovers in the refrigerator.
Yield: 2 dozen
